reviews.comment:
Exelente estacion
Rapidos, bna onda, serviciales, y lo q busques lo conseguis
10 puntos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station! Fast, friendly, helpful, and you can find whatever you're looking for.
10 points

reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio de ACA, muy limpia y cuidado jardines, lindo bar, estacionamento para 4 vehiculos para quien vá al bar o sanitários.

(Translated by Google)
ACA service station, very clean and well-maintained gardens, nice bar, parking for 4 vehicles for those going to the bar or restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Uno utiliza más para reuniones y disfrutar un café que cargar combustible, muy buena atención de los chicos y las chicas,

(Translated by Google)
It's more useful for meetings and enjoying a coffee than refueling; the staff are very attentive.
